description: Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking and methamphetamine production, formed as a remnant of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and Los Valencia. Founded in 2010 by Eznel Cortés Jiménez and Óscar Osvaldo García Montoya, it operated primarily in Mexico City and the State of Mexico. The group was involved in homicide, kidnapping, extortion, and other crimes. It was dismantled by 2016.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los miembros del grupo están parcialmente entrenados en Guatemala, donde Montoya sirvió en el ejército.
country_links.context: The organization's members are partially trained in Guatemala, where one of its leaders served in the army.
